codeReview.summary: The process-table-relationships feature is well-implemented with comprehensive test coverage. The implementation correctly handles parent/child pointer management, sibling list traversal, orphan adoption to init, and maintains thread safety through proper mutex locking.

summary: Review passed. The feature correctly implements parent/child relationship tracking with 23 comprehensive unit tests. Parent-child linkage (VAL-PROCESS-007) and child list traversal (VAL-PROCESS-008) are fully validated. Orphan adoption in ixland_exit() properly reparents orphaned children to init (PID 1), updates parent pointers and ppid values, and wakes up init's waiters. Thread safety is maintained through proper mutex locking on task structures.
